---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Brain Agent
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. For example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Which brain region(s) does this affect?

(e.g., thalamus, hippocampus, premotor-cortex, safety-cortex, all)

- [ ] Thalamus (routing / perception)
- [ ] Hippocampus (episodic memory)
- [ ] Prefrontal Cortex (planning / reasoning)
- [ ] Premotor Cortex (skill extraction)
- [ ] Safety Cortex (guardrails)
- [ ] DLPFC (working memory)
- [ ] Other: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
- [ ] All / General

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
